metadata.description: Portable agent skills in awesome-agent-skills plugin format.

plugins.name: elastic-search-logs
plugins.description: Query and analyze logs in Elasticsearch.

plugins.name: german-elster-tax-filing
plugins.description: Gather all required details to prepare a German ELSTER personal income tax return.

plugins.name: prompt-template-wizard
plugins.description: Collect and validate all required fields for a complete implementation prompt template.

plugins.name: read-only-gh-pr-review
plugins.description: Review GitHub pull requests with strict read-only CLI constraints.

plugins.name: read-only-postgres
plugins.description: Execute read-only SQL queries against PostgreSQL databases.

plugins.name: supabase
plugins.description: Run Supabase Management API SQL and operational database tasks.

plugins.name: svg-creator
plugins.description: Create, edit, validate, and package high-quality SVGs: icons, logos, illustrations, diagrams, charts, patterns, and inline SVG code.

plugins.name: trello
plugins.description: Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards via the Trello REST API.
